nasb.text: The rest of the dead did not come to life until the thousand years were completed. This is the first resurrection.

esv.text: The rest of the dead did not come to life until the thousand years were ended. This is the first resurrection.

cnv.text: 其餘的死人還沒有復活，等到那一千年完了。這是頭一次的復活。

ccb.text: 这是第一次的复活。其余已死的人要等到那一千年过去后，才会复活。

csbs.text: 其余死去的人还没有活过来，直到这一千年完结。这是第一次的复活。
